title: Number of Ways to Separate Numbers

testcases.input: num = "327" Output: 2 Explanation: You could have written down the numbers: 3, 27 327
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You could have written down the numbers: 3, 27 327

testcases.input: num = "094" Output: 0 Explanation: No numbers can have leading zeros and all numbers must be positive.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No numbers can have leading zeros and all numbers must be positive.

testcases.input: num = "0" Output: 0 Explanation: No numbers can have leading zeros and all numbers must be positive.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No numbers can have leading zeros and all numbers must be positive.
